snippet.title: Woman wakes up in the coffin at her funeral #shorts
snippet.description:
An Ecuadorian woman has risen from the 'dead' after almost being buried alive.

Shocking video footage shows the moment 76-year-old Bella Montoya was rescued from her coffin, after being stuck inside for over four hours.

The woman was declared deceased after suffering a stroke in hospital and taken to a local funeral home for preparations.

#BuriedAlive #Ecuador #BellaMontoya #Coffin #10NewsFirst

snippet.title: 50 Cent Bullied The Wrong Man, Terry Crews Exposed Him | Part 4 | #shorts
snippet.description:
See The FULL VIDEO right here: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FWGLLnPUK70&t=1s

Terry Crews is widely known for his impressive physique, but when 50 Cent called him out for not being a real man, it sparked a heated debate online. The controversy arose after Terry publicly shared his experience with sexual assault and voiced his support for the #MeToo movement. Despite Terry's bravery, 50 Cent mocked him for not fighting back, revealing a deeper issue around masculinity and what it means to be a real man.

#terrycrews #50cent
